delegatedBy.description: P58.9 phase setup: CRUD + SPEC + CONTEXT + PLAN

turns.content:
You are gsd-planner. Set up Phase 58.9 — sticky-bug-busting follow-up to P58.8 gap-fix.

## Context

P58.8 gap-fix (30 atomic commits) shipped 4 symptoms (S1-S4) fixes + 3 META process changes. A P51+ sticky bug hunt (`.planning/debug/p51-plus-sticky-bugs-2026-06-04.md`, 153 lines) found 12 bugs (3 critical, 4 high). Top 3 critical:

1. **P53 journal hook broken** — SessionManager.startPolling at src/features/tmux/session-manager.ts:328-356 never emits pane-captured events
2. **5 new vitest regressions** — eval/coherence.test.ts:37,106; bootstrap-tools-registration.test.ts:59; delegate-task.test.ts:197,239
3. **BATS structural bypass** — 7 of 8 tmux slots (62, 63, 64, 71, 72, 73, 74) don't exercise real opencode attach TUI path

The P58.8 plan is at .planning/phases/58-.../58-PLAN-08-GAP-FIX.md (558 lines). Use it as the template/conventions reference.

## Phase CRUD tasks

### T1: Create phase directory
.planning/phases/58.9-sticky-bug-busting/

### T2: Update ROADMAP
Append to .planning/ROADMAP.md (after P58 entry at line 2042):
```
### Phase 58.9: Sticky Bug Busting (2026-06-04)
- **Depends on:** Phase 58.8 (gap-fix)
- **Goal:** Fix 3 critical sticky bugs found in P51+ regression hunt
- **Scope:** REQ-58.9-01 (P53 journal wire), REQ-58.9-02 (5 vitest fixes), REQ-58.9-03 (BATS slot 75 real-runtime), REQ-58.9-04 (regression guards Cat 4-10)
- **Verification gate:** REAL UAT (human-driven) per META-04
- **Status:** 📋 PENDING
```

### T3: Update Symptom Coverage Matrix
Per REQ-58-META-03 process change, append rows to .planning/ROADMAP.md Symptom Coverage Matrix for the 12 sticky bugs (or summary by category).

## SPEC tasks (T4-T7)

Write .planning/phases/58.9-.../58.9-SPEC.md with these 4 REQs (use P58.8 SPEC as template at .planning/phases/58-.../58-SPEC.md):

### REQ-58.9-01: Wire pane-captured emit in SessionManager.startPolling
**User-Pain symptom:** P53 pane-monitor journal hook receives nothing from P58.8 polling loop. .hivemind/journal/<sid>/ stays empty. P53 invariant silently broken.
- Current: src/features/tmux/session-manager.ts:328-356 startPolling calls capturePaneContent but never emits pane-captured events
- Target: startPolling emits pane-captured events to event bus (compatible with P53 hook at src/hooks/pane-monitor.ts)
- Acceptance:
  - AC-58.9-01-01: After startPolling captures content, pane-captured event fires
  - AC-58.9-01-02: P53 hook receives event; .hivemind/journal/<sid>/<ts>-pane.json has 7 fields per P53 SPEC
  - AC-58.9-01-03: RED BATS 75-pane-captured-journal — assert journal file exists with correct schema
  - AC-58.9-01-04: RED-FIRST enforced
  - AC-58.9-01-05: 27-tool-key invariant preserved

### REQ-58.9-02: Fix 5 new vitest regressions
**User-Pain symptom:** P58.8 increased vitest failures from 2 to 7. New failures are timeouts in full-suite, pass in isolation.
- Current: 5 tests timeout in full-suite, pass in isolation
- Target: All 5 pass in full-suite OR skip with documented reason
- Acceptance:
  - AC-58.9-02-01: eval/coherence.test.ts:37 — passes in full-suite
  - AC-58.9-02-02: eval/coherence.test.ts:106 — passes in full-suite
  - AC-58.9-02-03: bootstrap-tools-registration.test.ts:59 — passes in full-suite
  - AC-58.9-02-04: delegate-task.test.ts:197 — passes in full-suite
  - AC-58.9-02-05: delegate-task.test.ts:239 — passes in full-suite
  - AC-58.9-02-06: vitest full-suite has ≤ 2 pre-existing failures (not regressions)
  - AC-58.9-02-07: tsc --noEmit clean

### REQ-58.9-03: BATS slot 75 — real opencode attach TUI in pane
**User-Pain symptom:** 7 BATS slots (62, 63, 64, 71, 72, 73, 74) use `cat` or inline mocks, never exercise the real opencode attach TUI path. User's S1 PUSH complaint cannot be reproduced in BATS.
- Current: tests/scripts/tmux/71-panel-live-update.bats uses `cat` + getPaneContent mock
- Target: tests/scripts/tmux/75-pane-real-runtime.bats spawns a real `opencode attach` TUI in a tmux pane and verifies live update
- Acceptance:
  - AC-58.9-03-01: tests/scripts/tmux/75-pane-real-runtime.bats exists
  - AC-58.9-03-02: BATS spawns real opencode attach in pane (not cat mock)
  - AC-58.9-03-03: BATS asserts pane content updates within 1s of new event
  - AC-58.9-03-04: BATS exits 0 when run against real opencode + tmux
  - AC-58.9-03-05: RED-FIRST enforced (test fails when no real opencode available, PASSES when real opencode + tmux + SDK event subscription all work)
  - AC-58.9-03-06: Documents BATS-skip behavior for environments without tmux (e.g., CI without real tmux server)

### REQ-58.9-04: Add Cat 4-10 regression guards
**User-Pain symptom:** Other regression categories (P52 action count, P51 contamination, AC#10/AC#11 manualOverride, 27-tool-key, P20) — even if currently PASS, need automated regression guards
- Current: Manual spot-checks only
- Target: Automated regression guards in tests/ that fail if any of these regress
- Acceptance:
  - AC-58.9-04-01: New test asserts src/plugin.ts has exactly 27 tool keys
  - AC-58.9-04-02: New test asserts src/tools/tmux-copilot.ts has manualOverride check FIRST for forward-prompt
  - AC-58.9-04-03: New test asserts src/plugin.ts:appendTuiPrompt has manualOverride check FIRST
  - AC-58.9-04-04: New test asserts package.json has no new deps vs last known state
  - AC-58.9-04-05: New test asserts TmuxMultiplexer + SessionManager are single source of truth (no fork patterns)

### Spec structure (per P58.8 template)

Include:
- ## Goal
- ## Background
- ## Requirements (4 REQs with Current/Target/Acceptance)
- ## Boundaries (In scope / Out of scope)
- ## Constraints
- ## Acceptance Criteria (checkboxes)
- ## Ambiguity Report (4 dimensions)
- ## User-Pain Coverage (per META REQ-58-META-01) — map each open symptom
- ## Interview Log
- Date stamp: 2026-06-04

## CONTEXT tasks (T8)

Write .planning/phases/58.9-.../58.9-CONTEXT.md with implementation decisions:

### D-58.9-01: P53 pane-captured event shape
- Reuse P53 event shape: {eventType, sessionId, paneId, emittedAt, content, byteLength, hash}
- Emit from SessionManager.startPolling tick
- Wire to P53 hook's event bus

### D-58.9-02: vitest timeout root cause
- Likely cause: test pollution from startPolling creating fake timers that don't get cleaned
- Fix: add afterEach cleanup; or use vi.useRealTimers in polling tests
- Or: skip with documented reason if root cause is unfixable

### D-58.9-03: BATS slot 75 design
- Uses real `opencode attach --server <url> --session <id> --dir <dir>` in pane
- Writes synthetic event via SDK to drive opencode attach
- Asserts pane content within 1s
- Skip pattern for environments without tmux: `[[ -z "${TMUX:-}" ]] && skip "no tmux server"`

### D-58.9-04: regression guard placement
- tests/integration/tool-key-invariant.test.ts (new) — for AC-04-01
- tests/integration/manualoverride-invariant.test.ts (new) — for AC-04-02, AC-04-03
- tests/integration/no-new-deps.test.ts (new) — for AC-04-04
- tests/integration/in-tree-tmux.test.ts (new) — for AC-04-05

## PLAN tasks (T9)

Write .planning/phases/58.9-.../58.9-PLAN-01.md with 4 waves:

### Wave 1: RED Tests (4 BATS, 1 vitest)
- R1: BATS 75-pane-captured-journal (for REQ-01)
- R2: BATS 76-pane-real-runtime (for REQ-03)
- R3: 5 vitest tests updated (for REQ-02)
- R4: 4 regression guard tests (for REQ-04)

### Wave 2: Implementation (~12 atomic commits)
- I1-I3: SessionManager.startPolling emit pane-captured
- I4-I7: Fix 5 vitest regressions
- I8-I10: BATS 75 real opencode attach
- I11: Update P53 hook if needed

### Wave 3: Integration (5 verification gates)
- Full BATS 62-76
- 27-tool-key check
- AC#10/AC#11 regression
- 5 vitest tests pass in full-suite
- tsc clean

### Wave 4: META docs (2 commits)
- Update USER-PAIN-BACKLOG with sticky bug resolutions
- Update Symptom Coverage Matrix

## Constraints

- L5 documentation only (no code changes)
- ONLY write to:
  - .planning/phases/58.9-sticky-bug-busting/ (SPEC, CONTEXT, PLAN)
  - .planning/ROADMAP.md (append P58.9 entry + symptom matrix)
- Use P58.8 SPEC/CONTEXT/PLAN as template
- Cite source files (P51+ sticky bug report, P58.8 plan, etc.)
- Ambiguity score ≤ 0.20
- Include User-Pain Coverage section in SPEC (per META REQ-01)
- Include Human-Driven UAT requirement in CONTEXT (per META REQ-02)
- Target: SPEC ~200 lines, CONTEXT ~150 lines, PLAN ~300 lines, ROADMAP +5 lines

## Return

- Files written (paths)
- Line counts
- REQs defined: 4
- Total tasks in PLAN
- Estimated atomic commits
- Ambiguity score
- Ready-for-execute confirmation
Now I have a complete picture. Let me set up tracking and start writing the artifacts.
Now I have everything I need. Let me update my todos and write the SPEC first.
Now let me write the CONTEXT.md.
Let me commit the planning artifacts per AGENTS.md atomic commit rules.

## PLANNING COMPLETE

**Plans:** 1 plan (`58.9-PLAN-01`) in 4 waves
**Commit:** `e7c95b05` on `feature/harness-implementation` (4 files changed, 1072 insertions)

### Wave Structure

| 2 | 2A (REQ-01, I1-I5) + 2B (REQ-02, I6-I8) + 2C (REQ-03, I11-I13) + 2D (REQ-04, I14-I18) = 16 impl commits, all parallel | yes (implementation) |
